name: Steamed Vegetables with Basil Pecan Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds small red potatoes, cut into
2 cups packed fresh basil leaves, washed well and
1/2 cup pecans, toasted golden and cooled
2 large garlic cloves, chopped and mashed to a paste
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the vegetables:
1. On a large steamer rack layer carrots, then fennel, and then potatoes and steam over boiling water, covered, until potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes. Transfer steamed vegetables to a platter.
2. Steam beans, covered, until just tender, about 10 minutes, and transfer to a platter.
3. In a food processor blend pesto with 3 tablespoons hot water, adding additional hot water if necessary to reach desired consistency.
4. Serve vegetables warm at room temperature with pesto.
To make the pesto:
1. In a food processor blend together all ingredients with salt and pepper to taste until smooth. Pesto keeps, surface covered with plastic wrap, chilled, 1 week. Makes about 1 1/4 cups.
